name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients: Cut corn tortillas into 1/2-inch strips. If using cooked chicken breasts, shred them.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic until the onion is tender.
3. Add broth, red bell pepper, ground red chiles, basil, salt, and pepper to the pot. Stir well.
4. Pour in tomato puree and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat and let it simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the tortilla strips until they are light golden brown (about 30-60 seconds). Remove from the oil and drain on paper towels.
6. Divide the soup among six bowls, topping each with shredded chicken. Sprinkle cheese over the top and add avocado slices before serving.
